title: Siren Head Southpoint Horror Mod
description: Horror mod. Based on the game: Sirenhead: Southpoint
body:
Welcome to the Siren Head Southpoint Horror Mod
![Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca100f65b7fbe8888fedcdc938cde49c946db75.png)
 


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HW3-sPC-DgM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sTgB_ER3Kqo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Soon after you enter, you will hear many unsettling sounds and at that moment, you are in danger. This mod introduces Siren Head — a tall and hostile creature that will hunt you. It produces many sounds, moves quickly, and can climb walls. When it gets close, the ground vibrates slightly and your screen will begin to shake continuously.

 

Your main way to defend yourself is the rifle:

+The built-in flashlight switches on when you hold the right mouse button, giving you just enough light to see your surroundings.

+If you have bullets, each shot can stun your target and deal significant damage.

 

You can find the rifle and its bullets in the camping area.

 

Add-on (Bedrock) very early test version (NOTE: Enable beta API): https://direct-link.net/3124060/T8aoDT3wOOw2

 
Feedback: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/siren-head-southpoint
 

Original game made by UndreamedPanic: https://undreamedpanic.itch.io/sirenhead-southpoint

Sirenhead was originally created by: https://twitter.com/slimyswampghost Trevor Henderson
